summary: Boundary-setting advocacy site for teens with an integrated game (from Figma link). The user wants the Boundary Setting Game for Teens implemented and linked correctly.
architectural_notes: Game source: Figma Make link https://www.figma.com/make/2G9H9FkHp10em4HtzI1AXl/Boundary-Setting-Game-for-Teens — must be embedded or linked so it is accessible to users

existing_features.title: Add a new 'Game' section/page to the frontend that embeds or links to the Boundary Setting Game for Teens. The game is hosted at: https://www.figma.com/make/2G9H9FkHp10em4HtzI1AXl/Boundary-Setting-Game-for-Teens?t=U3cianwoGcEygXpy-20&fullscreen=1 — embed it via an <iframe> with fullscreen support enabled (allow='fullscreen'). If iframe embedding is blocked by Figma, fall back to a prominent styled call-to-action button that opens the link in a new tab.
Add a 'Play the Game' navigation item to the sticky header so users can jump directly to the game section from anywhere on the page, consistent with the existing smooth-scroll navigation pattern.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement and embed the Boundary Setting Game for Teens from the provided Figma link, ensuring the link/embed works correctly
